title: Interior Designer Portfolio
description: A portfolio site designed to make a high-end interior designer look as established online as he is in person.
bestFit: Independent professionals who need their online presence to justify higher-ticket work.
constraints: The site had to make premium work feel premium online without burying it in a heavy browsing experience.
problem: The designer's exceptional work was invisible online. Lacking a professional website, he was losing high-value clients who couldn't find or verify his portfolio, limiting his business growth to word-of-mouth and an outdated social media presence.
solution: Designed and built a fast portfolio site that lets the work carry the pitch. The experience focused on immersive project presentation, high-quality imagery, and a clear path to consultation without cluttering the experience.
result: He now has a site that makes it easier to look credible, share work cleanly, and pitch larger interior design projects without relying on scattered social content.
